'''Jodelle Foxtrain''' was the twin sister of [[Amaiza Foxtrain/Legends|Amaiza Foxtrain]].

==Biography==
The twins were dancers on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. A [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businessman named [[Quatrain Pudundruh]] became their manager. After working with them for a [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he sold the sisters into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]] to make up for his failing assets.

They were purchased by the [[Black Hole Gang/Legends|Black Hole Gang]], a group of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] from [[Delphon/Legends|Delphon]]. Jodelle was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in an accident during one of the pirates' raids.
